title: DE73 8BA, Severn Trent Water Limited: environmental permit application advertisement - T/36/45725/R/V002
body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received a variation application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 from Severn Trent Water Limited.  Application number  T/36/45725/R/V002  Regulated facility type  Terminal pumping station  Regulated facility address   Breedon-On-The-Hill Terminal Pumping StationOff Main StreetBreedon-On-The-HillDerbyDerbyshireDE73 8BA   National grid reference discharge point  SK 41786 23916  Receiving environment  Ramsley Brook  Effluent type  Intermittent / emergency discharge  Volume  Dependent upon duration of the emergency  How to view the application  Please contact us via e-mail at psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk or contact us on 03708 506 506 to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 20 November 2024. You can comment:  Via email: psc-waterquality@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at https://www.gov.uk/guidance/environmental-permits-privacy-notice "
